problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
hypothesis: If Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism without dissociation is applied to be, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
